STUDENT WELFARE
Taking care of our students is our No.1 priority!
It is vital for the learning environment of a student to be peaceful and cheerful, so that the student can learn and excel with a happy frame of mind. Student Welfare cell of Sri Eshwar focusses on the various aspects of student wellness that is critical to his college life like Prevention of Sexual Harassment, Anti Ragging and discipline committees to ensure student safety and protection.
POSH CELL
Sri Eshwar has proactively established a cell for Prevention of Sexual Harassment (POSH) under the direction and recommendations of the National Accreditation and Assessment Council. In order to create and maintain a community in which our staff and students can work together in an environment free of sexual violence, harassment, exploitation and intimidation.
KNOW MORE
ANTI RAGGING
Sri Eshwar has a zero tolerance policy against Ragging of any kind. Sri Eshwar leadership team and faculty members go to great lengths to ensure that the seniors nurture and assist the juniors to promote their learning experience. Ragging of any kind can result in very strict disciplinary action including suspension or termination.
KNOW MORE
STUDENT COUNSELING
As part of Student Welfare, Sri Eshwar has a dedicated team to address and support mental health and well-being within institution. The primary focus of this committee is to provide counseling services, raise awareness about mental health issues, and create a supportive environment for individuals facing emotional or psychological challenges.
KNOW MORE
GRIEVANCE REDRESSAL
The Student Grievance Cell has been established with the aim of fostering a healthy and harmonious environment for both faculty and students, as well as addressing concerns from parents.Promoting an environment in which students feel comfortable expressing their concerns and issues freely, without the fear of facing any form of retaliation. Ensuring that student grievances are addressed effectively through an impartial and unbiased process, thereby facilitating fair resolutions.
KNOW MORE
STUDENT WELLNESS PROGRAMS
Apart from providing a tranquil environment that provides a serene and peaceful atmosphere for students, Sri Eshwar routinely conducts Wellness programs to rejuvenate students. Yoga sessions are conducted for students on a routine basis.
COME JOIN US TO
EXPERIENCE LEARNING
AT ITS BEST!
